summary: Completed testing of X-CLEAN iteration 9 features: Username/password authentication, admin user management (create user, reset password, toggle active status), and booking with second car option. All 12 backend tests passed. Fixed bug in bookings.py where status change notifications were not being created. Frontend login, settings page with user management, and booking page with second car option all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - admin/admin123 returns 200 with user data
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - missing fields returns 422
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns current user with valid session
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns 401 without session
Backend: POST /api/auth/create-user - creates new user (admin only)
Backend: POST /api/auth/create-user - duplicate username returns 400
Backend: PUT /api/auth/reset-password/{user_id} - resets password
Backend: PUT /api/auth/toggle-user/{user_id} - toggles active status
Backend: Inactive user cannot login (returns 401 'fiók inaktív')
Backend: POST /api/bookings with second_car creates linked bookings
Backend: Second car booking scheduled after first car's time slot
Backend: Notification created on booking status change (after bug fix)
Backend: Notification created on booking date/time modification
Frontend: /login page shows username/password form with data-testid attributes
Frontend: Login with admin/admin123 redirects to dashboard
Frontend: /settings page shows user management table (admin only)
Frontend: Settings - New user dialog with username, password, name, email, role fields
Frontend: Settings - User create form submits successfully
Frontend: Settings - Password reset and toggle active buttons visible
Frontend: /booking page - Step 1 shows location and service selection
Frontend: /booking page - Step 2 shows calendar with time slots
Frontend: /booking page - Step 3 has 'Második autó hozzáadása' button
Frontend: /booking page - Second car form appears with plate, type, service dropdown
Frontend: /booking page - Step 4 summary shows both cars with total price

bug_fixed.issue: Status change notifications not being created - original_booking was fetched AFTER update so comparison always showed same status
bug_fixed.fix: Moved original_booking fetch to BEFORE the update operation

seed_data_creation: Created worker 'Test Worker Debrecen' for Debrecen location to enable time slot availability. Test users created with usernames like testuser_*, resettest_*, toggletest_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 replaced Google Auth with username/password login. Admin user exists with credentials admin/admin123. Settings page (/settings) allows admins to create users, reset passwords, and toggle active status. Booking page (/booking) has a 'Második autó hozzáadása' button in Step 3 that shows additional fields for second car (plate_number, car_type, service_id). Second car booking is scheduled after first car based on service duration. Bug was fixed where status change notifications were not being created - the original_booking was being fetched after the update, so the status comparison always showed no change. AI endpoints will return errors as LLM key budget is depleted.
